deeperExplanation: The Event Loop becomes more powerful when combined with other JavaScript concepts. In production, it interacts with error handling, validation, and optimization.
mutabilityExplained: Consider whether your data structures should be mutable or immutable when implementing this pattern.
noneValue: Always check for null/None/undefined values — this is the most common source of runtime errors.
internalImplementation: The javascript runtime handles this efficiently behind the scenes.

examples.title: Getting Started with The Event Loop
examples.explanation: Basic introduction to The Event Loop.

debuggingWalkthrough.scenario: A the event loop implementation behaves unexpectedly.

performanceNotes.notes: Performance varies by implementation. Profile to find bottlenecks.
